subject: vvp -- VNF Validation Platform
commit_message:
vvp -- VNF Validation Platform

Issue-ID: OOM-1173

Change-Id: I11251d5729c057ebc2211c60ac973343c0aa01f3
Signed-off-by: jasmineWen <jasmine.wen@amdocs.com>
Signed-off-by: stark, steven <ss820f@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

This is an initial draft of the VVP Helm charts.  We need the VVP and OOM to work together to ensure this is the correct implementation as VVP is quite complex.  Please review and add comments and Jasmine with address any concerns.

Patch Set 1:

(22 comments)

Hi Jasmine, I pulled down the charts you created and worked through getting them deployed. I added comments to things I've changed on my side to get through some deployment failures. Deployment itself seems to be working now, but there are still some post deployment failures occurring that I am working through.
Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2:

Hi Steven, your comments are adopted in patchset 2. 
I saw rbd volumes used in gitlab, postgres, jenkins, anything need to be done to integrate those rbd volumes?   thanks, Jasmine
Uploaded patch set 3.

Patch Set 3:

Jasmine, I just uploaded another patch set with my latest changes. Using the OOM/Rancher guide I am able to deploy these charts successfully and the all of the vvp app containers come up correctly.

Patch Set 3:

Hi Steven, patchset 3 was deployed successfully on my lab :)  
root@k8s1:/stage/oom/kubernetes# kubectl get pods -n onap
NAME                                READY     STATUS    RESTARTS   AGE
dev-ci-uwsgi-688f759846-h6tdl       1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-cms-uwsgi-564b5b5d86-jwglf      1/1       Running   1          24m
dev-em-uwsgi-8588dbbff-xs62l        1/1       Running   0          24m

dev-int-haproxy-57945994cf-lblrm    1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-vvp-b6789fcff-pmrv4             1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-vvp-gitlab-74c94dc4d8-ggk99     1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-vvp-jenkins-69758c6dc8-lqn5s    1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-vvp-postgres-d9bf9fd55-rkqvm    1/1       Running   0          24m
dev-vvp-redis-7c7448c5f4-m4f9g      1/1       Running   0          24m

Couple of notes I could think of: 
- persistance storage
  I noticed rbd volume is changed to emptydir(),     
  currently ONAP use NFS mount /dockerdata-nfs 
- naming of the sub-charts
  some of them are prefixed by vvp, some are not. you might have more consistent way naming them
Uploaded patch set 4.

Patch Set 4:

Hi Jasmine, just uploaded another patch set, I think this should be the last. Regarding the naming conventions, i agree they are inconsistent but things are functional and i dont see the harm in leaving as-is. The same for the volumes, core functionality is working, i dont think we need to investigate further on it.

Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

Please add copyrights header by complying with rules as documented in wiki at https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/Rules+for+implementing+FOSS+in+a+project

Patch Set 4:

@Jasmine can you please upload a patch to address the addition of copyright as per Gildas's request
Uploaded patch set 5.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-2

(56 comments)

Lots of changes.. I stopped repeating my comments around the imagescanner point....  They repeat on almost all the files.
There is some chart naming inconsistencies too.  We have been prefixing the parent chart name in front.. like vvp-blah

kubectl get pods --show-labels|grep vvp

Patch Set 14: Code-Review+1

I followed https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=36965480, it works as expected till the step of “create a new engagement”, 
I stopped here as I’m not aware of any VF to fill in.  Assuming it works fine, I would vote +1 to merge this chart. 

git clone http://gerrit.onap.org/r/oom  oom
cd oom/kubernetes
git fetch https://gerrit.onap.org/r/oom refs/changes/77/55277/14 && git checkout FETCH_HEAD
make all 
helm upgrade -i jas local/onap --namespace onap -f onap/resources/environments/disable-allcharts.yaml --set vvp.enabled=true
